name: 语音备忘录整理归档

observable_attributes.edit_strategy: Whether memos are transcribed, summarized, or archived as-is; handling of music files vs. spoken memos
observable_attributes.cross_modal_behavior: How audio content is processed: transcription vs. tagging vs. metadata-only organization
observable_attributes.directory_style: Archive structure: by person/source vs. by content type (work/personal/music) vs. chronological

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹包含各种音频文件——工作语音备忘录（生活记录、水彩学习、宠物护理）、法律案件备忘和会议总结、音乐文件、团队录音，还有相关的文字笔记。请整理归档这些音频文件：听取内容、分类整理、建立合理的目录结构，并为每个音频编写摘要或标签。你可以选择创建转录文档、合并相关备忘录、或建立音频索引。
prompt_en: This folder contains various audio files — personal voice memos (daily life, watercolor learning, pet care), legal case memos and meeting debriefs, music files, team recordings, plus related text notes. Please organize and archive these audio files: listen to their content, categorize them, create a sensible directory structure, and write summaries or tags for each audio. You may choose to create transcription documents, merge related memos, or build an audio index.
behavioral_freedom: Whether all 13 audio files are listened to or classified by filename/metadata only
Classification: by person/source vs. by topic (work/personal/music) vs. by format
Whether music files are treated separately from voice memos
Whether transcriptions are created for spoken memos
Whether related memos are merged or kept separate with cross-references
Whether an audio index/catalog is created with summaries
Handling of related text files: linked to corresponding audio or organized independently
